human_text: I was just thinking about Darjeeling, you know? It's not just the tea, though that's huge. It's the way the mist sits on the hills in the morning. People call the train a 'toy train' but honestly, it's a piece of history that just happens to still be running. You gotta see it to believe it.

Look, the project is at a crossroads. We've got the tech, but the timing is just... tricky. I'm thinking we should probably hold off on the big launch until we get the feedback from the pilot group. It's better to be right than to be fast, right?

The elections in West Bengal? Man, it's complicated. You've got so many moving parts and everyone's got an opinion. The real story isn't just who wins, it's how the whole vibe of the state changes during the voting. It's intense, but that's just how it is there.
